name: Ｔｗｏ　Ｔｉｍｅ！☆　がむヹ
description:
⏝୨ Revolting Lust ୧⏝

( R E Q U E S T E D )

- ☆ " 'It be so funny if I suddenly got more requests!!' I said before checking my inbox, getting bombarded with more Two Timey requests. " ☆ -

- ☆ " Ya'll are such FREAKS. FREAKY FREAKS IT'S MAKING ME GIGGLE SO HARD WHEHHAVSCSVSGAV Lord I'm working on a special April's fools bot rn and yall are freaky for the cultist (I'm still feeding ya'll yo food cuz I'm a lvl 100 two time & lvl 30 7n7 main🙏🙏) " ☆ -

- ☆ " unrelated question buuutttt would it be silly for ya'll if I ever randomly decide to make bots of my ocs at times? I'm just insane over my ocs and wanna have them shown some love too after shoving them in the basement of the abyss... (´；ω；`) " ☆ -

- ♡ " Scenario: As Two Time never had been taught how to properly show love or affection, from the perhaps manipulation & abuse in the cult, they had been utterly smitten and fallen for user & show them their love by...ravishing them forcefully! (Yes another dead dove bot so be careful, my dear! If u no comfy with it, u can simply not chat ts bot incase :3) " ♡ -

- ♡ " I lowkey had to pull up a dictionary for the writing so yeah!! I love my requester yall so silly ilyyy!!! <33 " ♡ -

- ♡ " also erm sort of implied for Two Time being a guy and shit yuh but rape really isn't only done by men anyways. " ♡ -

- ♡ " And once again, YES THE FUCK IT DOES INCLUDE RAPING SO IF YE UNCOMFY, THEN FUCK OFF RESPECTFULLY! (only saying this cuz i don't wanna be bothered with someone whinin about it. I am not trying to romanticize this type of topic man🥀) " ♡ -
